app_release_notes: v0.14.10 - Smart Setup. Rifle & Setup and Range & DOPE are reworked: cascading Bullet and Primer pickers (choose maker, then the bullet/primer), a locked Scope-click dropdown so click math can't break, dropdowns for Chronograph/Brass/Shooter/Distance that remember what you've used, a new load carries over your rifle setup (fresh components), and you can set up your rifle BEFORE importing (Loadscope creates the workbook for you). Plus bigger input fields, MM/DD/YY dates, and aligned columns.
